text.title: User Interviews Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying User Interviews. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: draft-mom-test-script
step.action: Write ≤10 past-tense questions + opener with all 5 steps.

step.name: extract-and-count
step.action: Tag insights; count frequency across sessions.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
